name: dev-chronicler
description: Keeps an automatic, human-readable chronicle of the decisions and actions taken while developing a project, and feeds it back to fresh agents as handover memory.

decision_log_mode.title: Decision log mode
decision_log_mode.description: propose = draft an ADR and confirm with you before writing it; auto = write ADRs directly without asking.

chronicle_root.title: Chronicle root folder
chronicle_root.description: Name of the visible folder (relative to the project root) that holds decisions/, actions/ and handovers/.

stop_nudge.title: Stop nudge
stop_nudge.description: on = after a work session, gently remind to log an action entry if one looks missing; off = never nudge.
